prompt: Create a photorealistic wide-angle night baseball game scene from a low camera position just behind home plate, as if shot with a professional sports camera. The main subject is a right-handed batter in a white and gray away uniform with black helmet standing in the left foreground, bat raised and ready to swing. Directly behind him are exactly 2 crouched figures: a catcher in dark navy protective gear and an umpire in black uniform leaning forward. On the field show exactly 4 additional visible players: the pitcher in a dark navy jersey and white pants mid-delivery on the mound, one infielder near second base, one fielder on the far right, and one distant fielder near the outfield. The baseball should be visible in midair traveling from the pitcher toward the plate. Set the scene in a packed stadium at night with bright floodlights, green outfield walls, a brown dirt infield, crisp white chalk batter's box lines, and a lush green grass field. In the upper right background include a large illuminated Japanese-style scoreboard filled with inning numbers, team rows, colorful statistics, and dense small Japanese text, without needing perfectly readable characters. The stands should be crowded with thousands of spectators wearing mostly light clothing, creating a realistic textured crowd. Use dramatic stadium lighting, deep shadows, high ISO sports photography realism, natural motion tension, sharp foreground detail, slightly softer distant crowd, cinematic 16:9 composition, no watermark, no added captions.
